page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9i.48xlarge is a general-purpose server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 192 dedicated physical cores and 192 vCPUs, operating at a clock speed of 3.2 GHz. The processor is an Intel Xeon 6982P-C. With a 1:1 ratio of physical cores to threads, each vCPU maps to a dedicated physical core, eliminating resource sharing at the thread level.

The instance is equipped with 768.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, meaning storage requirements must be met through external network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers.

This hardware profile is designed for large-scale workloads requiring high parallel processing capabilities and a balanced memory-to-core ratio. The dedicated core allocation makes it suitable for compute-heavy tasks, enterprise applications, and multi-threaded processing environments where resource contention must be avoided.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9i.48xlarge is a general-purpose server instance built on the KVM hypervisor and powered by an Intel Xeon 6982P-C processor. It features 192 dedicated physical cores and 192 vCPUs on the x86_64 architecture, running at a clock speed of 3.2 GHz. The system provides 768.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. This instance does not include local storage or GPUs, relying on external storage solutions. It delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps. Designed for high-density parallel processing, the ecs.g9i.48xlarge is suited for enterprise applications, large-scale web serving, and multi-threaded workloads requiring dedicated CPU resources without hyperthreading overhead.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g9i.48xlarge is a general-purpose server featuring 192 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 768 GB of RAM, and 64 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for demanding enterprise workloads.

tagline: A high-density dedicated core server offering balanced memory allocation and high-speed network bandwidth for parallel enterprise workloads.
